verses.latin_vulgate: Psalmus David.   Dominus regit me, et nihil mihi deerit :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִזְמ֥וֹר לְדָוִ֑ד יְהֹוָ֥ה רֹ֝עִ֗י לֹ֣א אֶחְסָֽר׃
verses.king_james: The Lord is my shepherd; I shall not want.

verses.latin_vulgate: in loco pascuæ, ibi me collocavit.  Super aquam refectionis educavit me ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בִּנְא֣וֹת דֶּ֭שֶׁא יַרְבִּיצֵ֑נִי עַל־מֵ֖י מְנֻח֣וֹת יְנַהֲלֵֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: He maketh me to lie down in green pastures: he leadeth me beside the still waters.

verses.latin_vulgate: animam meam convertit.  Deduxit me super semitas justitiæ  propter nomen suum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נַפְשִׁ֥י יְשׁוֹבֵ֑ב יַֽנְחֵ֥נִי בְמַעְגְּלֵי־צֶ֝֗דֶק לְמַ֣עַן שְׁמֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: He restoreth my soul: he leadeth me in the paths of righteousness for his name’s sake.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nam etsi ambulavero in medio umbræ mortis,  non timebo mala, quoniam tu mecum es.  Virga tua, et baculus tuus,  ipsa me consolata sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גַּ֤ם כִּֽי־אֵלֵ֨ךְ בְּגֵ֪יא צַלְמָ֡וֶת לֹא־אִ֘ירָ֤א רָ֗ע כִּי־אַתָּ֥ה עִמָּדִ֑י שִׁבְטְךָ֥ וּ֝מִשְׁעַנְתֶּ֗ךָ הֵ֣מָּה יְנַֽחֲמֻֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: Yea, though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I will fear no evil: for thou art with me; thy rod and thy staff they comfort me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Parasti in conspectu meo mensam  adversus eos qui tribulant me ;  impinguasti in oleo caput meum :  et calix meus inebrians, quam præclarus est !
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תַּעֲרֹ֬ךְ לְפָנַ֨י ׀ שֻׁלְחָ֗ן נֶ֥גֶד צֹרְרָ֑י דִּשַּׁ֥נְתָּ בַשֶּׁ֥מֶן רֹ֝אשִׁ֗י כּוֹסִ֥י רְוָיָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Thou preparest a table before me in the presence of mine enemies: thou anointest my head with oil; my cup runneth over.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et misericordia tua subsequetur me  omnibus diebus vitæ meæ ;  et ut inhabitem in domo Domini  in longitudinem dierum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַ֤ךְ ׀ ט֤וֹב וָחֶ֣סֶד יִ֭רְדְּפוּנִי כׇּל־יְמֵ֣י חַיָּ֑י וְשַׁבְתִּ֥י בְּבֵית־יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה לְאֹ֣רֶךְ יָמִֽים׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Surely goodness and mercy shall follow me all the days of my life: and I will dwell in the house of the Lord for ever.
